Orchestra membership — janusplot

Source: CONSTELLATION_MEMBER.md

This project (janusplot) is a MEMBER of the Orchestra (one coordination structure; reconciled 2026-06-03). The leader-node is ORCHESTRA_dev (governance, roster, contracts, TACI, publication); the technical inference hub is flexyBayes (the dependency-DAG sink). This file is janusplot’s back-pointer to that charter and a map of my siblings.

  • My role: the diagnostic-visualisation member — asymmetric, directional, non-linear pairwise-association matrices via penalised GAM smooths, with analytic derivatives + simultaneous CIs and an objective 24-category shape classifier (the “what shape and which direction is this relationship” lens a scalar correlation matrix hides). Candidate diagnostic-visualisation hub (P4).
  • Contracts I own / honour: I emit no manifest (a diagnostic member). I consume tabular data; I produce a figure + a shape taxonomy. The asymmetry index is a non-linear causal-direction screen, never a causal verdict.
  • My edge: diagnostic — janusplot reads any member’s data/residuals and types the association shapes (dose-response, compensation, crossover). Complements kernR’s kernel dependence statistic with a visual, directional, shape-typed view. No hard dependency on another member.
  • What binds me (charter invariants): single-responsibility (association diagnostics + shape typing, not a causal test or a decision); honest per-cell degradation (indeterminate/flat categories + k_check basis-deficiency flags, not a fabricated shape); leader-directed adoption.
  • Governance: janusplot is a Max-owned personal package (MIT-track); the AAGI-AUS canon does not apply.

My siblings (the full roster — so I am informed about the others)

Member Role Class
flexyBayes inference hub (owns C1/C4/C5/C7) open (AAGI-gated)
PESTO calibration + manifest source (C2) open
kernR validation + TACI/ACI engine open
proxymix KL-optimal proxy compression; the proxymix_map optimisation engine open
gretaR engine — torch MCMC open
koine synthesis — fourth opinion open
terroir data collector (C6) open (MIT)
kalmix state-space / change-point / ACI open (MIT)
masque data sovereignty (clones) open
apsimR external engine — APSIM Next Gen open (MIT-src)
bourse grounded market-data connector (trading arm) open
survkit time-to-event toolkit open
janusplot asymmetric GAM association matrices (this package; diagnostic-viz) open
gpfield change-of-support spatial GP; emits orchestra_manifest open (MIT)
decideR decision layer (loss-optimal closer) open
grainPlan grain decision-orchestration (on decideR) open (MIT)
optimix optimisation meta-layer; emits orchestra_manifest open (MIT)
flexyBayesOrchestra composition layer (surrogates, koine backend) open

Planned: genoR. Canonical charter: ORCHESTRA_dev/ORCHESTRA.md (mirrored in the MaxAIbase brain, open tier). Contract + dependency DAG: ORCHESTRA_dev/integration/orchestra_manifest.R.

Developed by Max Moldovan.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
